mentions_legales.quote: **Flo Health UK Limited** is a company registered in the U.K. and the registered data controller of the Services.

mentions_legales.label: Forme juridique
mentions_legales.quote: Flo Health UK Limited is a company registered in the U.K.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: You can also reach us by email at **support@flo.health** or **dpo@flo.health**.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy explains how Flo Health UK Limited and our other companies ("**Flo**" or "**we**" or "**us**") follow privacy laws such as the General Data Protection Regulation ("**GDPR**"), the UK GDPR, and any other laws that protect your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Flo Health UK Limited** is a company registered in the U.K. and the registered data controller of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Or you can get in touch with our data protection officer at **dpo@flo.health.**

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- **General information:**When you sign up for our Services, we collect personal data like your name, email, birth month and year, password, location, time zone, and language. Based on how you use the Services, we may also infer your sex or gender.

- **Well-being:**When using our Services, you may enter personal data (including ‘special category data’ as defined in the UK GDPR) about yourself, such as your weight, height, BMI, body temperature, and menstrual cycle details.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Purpose of processing | Legal basis for processing | Example |
|---|---|---|
| To support the App’s features, including tailored content, insights and materials in the App, we use the personal data you provide within the App; machine learning models for cycle predictions; the Services you choose to use (e.g. your selected mode) and the App features you interact with; information from connected third-party services (like Apple HealthKit and Google Health Connect); and certain information provided in onboarding questionnaires. | Consent | We use your cycle data to predict future cycles or ovulation, analyse your personal data to offer new features and Services, and suggest articles or materials (e.g., stories, Health Assistant, and Secret Chats) for you to read. |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Your consent is required for us to use your health data.** You can withdraw this consent at any time by either contacting us or deleting your account through the App.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We will keep your personal data for as long as necessary to provide you with the Services or fulfill the purposes for which it was collected (except as noted below).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We will not share your personal data with third parties except as specified within this Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Data from external sources:** We may receive your personal data from third parties. For example, they may provide additional information to enhance your existing data, personalise your experience, and support analytics and statistics.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Depending on local laws, you may have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority about any of our activities.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Correction of your personal data**

If you think your personal data that we hold is incorrect, you can contact us to request a correction.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Access to your personal data**

You have the right to know what personal data we process about you. You can request access to all your personal data and to receive a copy of it, including in a structured and portable form (we use .json files).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Erasure of your personal data**

You can ask us to delete your personal data at any time. Keep in mind that deleting some personal data might affect your experience with certain features that depend on historic information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Restriction of processing**

You can request that we limit the processing of your personal data in certain circumstances. For example, if you believe your personal data is inaccurate, you can ask us to restrict the processing while we verify it.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Right to data portability**

You can request your personal data in a format that lets you easily move, copy or transfer it to third parties for other services or purposes.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
**Objection to the processing of your personal data**

You can object to the processing of your personal data, such as if we use it for direct marketing purposes.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: To collect this and other information, we may use cookies and other similar technologies. See more in our **Cookie Policy**.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: AppsFlyer, Firebase and TikTok Ad Manager. These are mobile app marketing and analytics platforms (not social media platforms) who help us improve our advertising campaigns, understand the performance of our campaigns and spread the word about Flo.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: **1. When you become a Flo member and give your consent, we share the following personal data with AppsFlyer and its partners to promote the Services:**

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Flo is based in the UK. The personal data we collect is transferred to and processed in the US, where it is subject to US law and to other countries (where it follows the laws of those countries).

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: These transfers are usually cloud-based and occur when you use our Services.
